{
  "claims": [
    "The Redondo Beach homeless court program has been effective in getting homeless individuals off the streets.",
    "The program provides treatment and support services for mental health, alcohol and substance abuse, and job training.",
    "The Redondo Beach Homeless Court is successful in obtaining permanent housing for a population that is generally resistant to services and housing.",
    "Bringing court proceedings outdoors closer to the places participants eat and sleep has made the justice system more accessible.",
    "The state funds will ensure that the unhoused can continue to receive services to overcome obstacles to becoming permanently housed.",
    "Housing Initiative Court is a program that schedules misdemeanor defendants experiencing homelessness on a dedicated court date each month."
  ]
